name: double-ml-time-series-web
description: Web consumer of book-scaffold-astro (academic profile) for the Double Machine Learning for Time Series manuscript. Companion to the LaTeX book at the repo root.

scripts.predev: npm run build:bib && npm run build:labels --if-present
scripts.prebuild: npm run build:bib && npm run build:labels --if-present && npm run validate
scripts.ci:validate: BOOK_PROFILE=academic npm run build:bib && BOOK_PROFILE=academic npm run build:labels --if-present && BOOK_PROFILE=academic npm run validate
